basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website of IIM Kozhikode. Has been announced through the IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Post-Graduation in Public Health/ Management or similar academic disciplines with one year post-qualification experience. Proficient in MS-Office (word, excel, power point, software package etc.), internet usage, digital tools, applications, Zoom or any online meeting tools. Good Communication proficiency in English (Both written and verbal). Quantitative research skills. Desirable: Experience in healthcare Projects.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application details Interview through video conference
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode is 09-06-2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post-Graduation in Public Health/ Management or similar academic disciplines, along with one year of post-qualification experience. Proficiency in MS-Office, internet usage, and digital tools is also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Assistant position is 40 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant position will receive a salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their application details, followed by an interview conducted through video conference.

faq.question: Q7. What is the type of job for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Research Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIM Kozhikode located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode is located in Kozhikode, Kerala, with the pincode 673570.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable qualifications for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Experience in healthcare projects is considered a desirable qualification for the Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant recruitment must be submitted online only. Offline applications will not be accepted.
